message: Bootstrapped Waystation ledger files by hand.
Canonical records are JSON; Markdown generated one-way for humans.
LLM prompt-rewrite/agent-suggestion are dashboard-only, advisory, deferred.

title: Unsanitized issue ids can write outside .waystation/issues
Any agent can release or finish another agent active claim
MCP get_status reports ready tasks using different rules than core
Generated status and blocked reports misclassify review and blocked tasks
Dashboard git commit endpoint trusts arbitrary pathspecs and ignores git add failure
Frontend API helper treats every response as a valid JSON CommandResult
